prompt: The following VCF record has a multi-allelic INFO/AF field. Using AF and the total allele number (AN), calculate the expected number of reference alleles in the cohort.
context:
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	IRIS_095
chr05	7291038	.	A	G,T	4180	PASS	AF=0.24,0.11;AN=6020;AC=1445,662	GT:DP:GQ	0/1:30:88
correct_answer: Reference allele count = AN - AC(G) - AC(T) = 6020 - 1445 - 662 = 3913. Alternatively: REF frequency = 1 - 0.24 - 0.11 = 0.65, so expected REF count = 0.65 * 6020 = 3913.
rubric: Must calculate 3913 reference alleles using either AN minus AC values or 1 minus sum of AF times AN.
notes: Tests calculation of reference allele count from multi-allelic AF/AN/AC fields.
